finding: `taskflow open --write` in template-only fallback recommends `node atm.mjs tasks new --template aao-l2-split ...`, but both frozen and source-first `tasks new` fail with `Template not found: aao-l2-split` because the framework repo does not contain the advertised markdown template assets.
expectedBehavior: The fallback generator should either bundle the documented default templates in both source and release runners, or help text should only recommend templates that actually exist.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed by adding `packages/atm-markdown-task-source/templates/aao-l2-split-template.md`, including `templates` in the package manifest, and extending `tests/cli/tasks-new.test.ts` to prove source package assets plus frozen `node atm.mjs tasks new --template aao-l2-split` generation both work.
followUp: Keep the tasks-new regression in `validate:cli`; future default template keys in taskflow/tasks help must resolve before release.
